title: Isolate the trigonometric function
text: Begin by isolating the sine function on one side of the equation.

title: Solve for \sin(2\theta)
text: What is the value of $$\sin(2\theta)$$ after isolating it?

title: Find general solutions for the angle
Solve for $$\theta$$ and apply interval
text: Substitute $$u$$ $$=$$ 2\theta$$ back into your general solutions and solve for $$\theta$$. $$Then$$, $$find$$ $$all$$ $$solutions$$ $$that$$ $$fall$$ $$within$$ $$the$$ $$interval$$ $$0\leq\theta<2pi$$.

title: Determine number of solutions
text: Since the period of $$\sin(2\theta)$$ is $$\pi$$, $$how$$ $$many$$ $$full$$ $$cycles$$ $$of$$ $$2\theta$$ are covered in the interval $$(0$$, $$2\pi)$$ for $$\theta$$? $$This$$ $$will$$ $$tell$$ $$you$$ $$how$$ $$many$$ $$solutions$$ $$to$$ $$expect$$.
